channel.title: ATISoluciones Diseño de Sistemas Electrónicos, S.L. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by ATISoluciones Diseño de Sistemas Electrónicos, S.L. (atis).

item.title: CVE-2025-13596 · 2.7 LOW 🌩️ — Improper Error Handling Leading to Sensitive Information Disclosure in CIGES ≤ 2.15.6
item.description: A sensitive information disclosure vulnerability exists in the error handling component of ATISoluciones CIGES Application version 2.15.6 and earlier. When certain unexpected conditions trigger unhandled exceptions, the application returns detailed e…

item.title: CVE-2025-1751 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SQL Injection CIGES
item.description: A SQL Injection vulnerability has been found in Ciges 2.15.5 from ATISoluciones. This vulnerability allows an attacker to retrieve, create, update and delete database via $idServicio parameter in /modules/ajaxBloqueaCita.php endpoint.
